modules.name: Introduction to Helpdesk Software
modules.description: Overview of helpdesk platforms, ITSM concepts, and the role of helpdesk in IT operations.

lessons.title: Helpdesk Software Overview and ITSM Fundamentals
topics: Helpdesk purpose and value in IT operations
The role of helpdesk in the support lifecycle

lessons.title: Helpdesk Features and Platform Comparison
topics: Helpdesk integrations overview (email, chat, CRM, monitoring)

modules.name: Setting Up the Helpdesk System
modules.description: Configuring a helpdesk platform including user roles, branding, and integrations.

lessons.title: System Configuration and User Roles
topics: Initial helpdesk system setup and configuration
Agent, admin, and end-user account types

lessons.title: Integrations and Communication Channels
topics: Chat integration and live support channels

modules.name: Ticket Management and Workflow
modules.description: Managing the full ticket lifecycle from creation through resolution.

lessons.title: Ticket Lifecycle Management
topics: Ticket updates, status tracking, and communication

lessons.title: Categorization, Prioritization, and SLAs
topics: Response time and resolution time targets

modules.name: Knowledge Management
modules.description: Building and maintaining a knowledge base for self-service and resolution efficiency.

lessons.title: Knowledge Base Creation and Management
topics: Organizing articles by category and audience
Version control and article review cycles

modules.name: Automation and Customization
modules.description: Automating repetitive tasks and customizing workflows to match organizational processes.

lessons.title: Form and Workflow Customization
topics: Custom ticket fields and data capture
Testing and iterating on custom workflows

modules.name: Reporting and Analytics
modules.description: Using helpdesk data to track performance and drive improvement.

lessons.title: Helpdesk Metrics and Dashboards
topics: Response time and resolution time metrics

lessons.title: Analytics and Data-Driven Decisions
topics: Using data to inform staffing and resource decisions

modules.name: Best Practices and Troubleshooting
modules.description: Operational best practices, common issues, and continuous improvement.

lessons.title: Best Practices and Operational Optimization
topics: Helpdesk best practices and operational standards
Common helpdesk issues and resolution patterns

lessons.title: Continuous Improvement and Optimization
topics: Feedback loops and user satisfaction surveys
Adapting to organizational growth and change
Career paths in IT service management
